User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account registration with CRM role information.

role.description: The security access privilege level in this CRM.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was provisioned.

Contact.title: Contact Details
Contact.description: Information about a client contact, customer, or prospect manager.

company.description: Employer or corporate association of the contact.

tags.description: Associated search tags or segment labels.

ownerId.description: The CRM User UID who manages/owns this client contact.

Lead.title: Sales Lead
Lead.description: Prospects captured from input streams, website forms, or marketing.

source.description: Origin of the lead, e.g. Website, Referral, Cold Call.

score.description: Lead score (0-100) indicating likelihood to purchase.

assignedTo.description: Recipient UID of the sales agent handling the lead.

Opportunity.title: Deal Opportunity
Opportunity.description: Sales pipeline contracts, tracking stages, pricing, and close probabilities.

stage.description: The current stage in the Kanban deal pipeline.

amount.description: Total estimated value of the deal in USD.

contactId.description: Foreign key to the primary contact associated with this deal.

Task.title: Calendar Task
Task.description: Activities, meetings, calls, and actions scheduled for deal progression.

assignedTo.description: User UID who is scheduled to perform this activity.

relatedId.description: ID of related resource (e.g. Contact ID, Opportunity ID, Lead ID).

Note.title: Record Notes
Note.description: Log comments, follow-up briefings, or call notes tied to accounts.

authorId.description: UID of the agent who wrote this note.

relatedType.description: Entity collection name of the related model.

createdAt.description: Time when this note was logged.

users.description: Stores user registration and CRM security authorization levels.

contacts.description: Directory of business-to-business or personal customer contact files.

leads.description: Captured sales prospects awaiting review and conversion.

opportunities.description: The CRM interactive sales pipelines and stages.

tasks.description: Calendar schedule tracker for managing agenda items.

notes.description: Annotated activity log files linked to contacts, leads, and deals.
